sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(153) — Trinity River, above Trinity Lake (Trinity Co.)
sources.quotedText: (153) Trinity River, above Trinity Lake (Trinity Co.) from the confluence with Tangle Blue Creek (Hwy. 3), downstream (south) to the mouth of Trinity Lake, approximately 13.8 miles. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: Shasta-Trinity National Forest: Recreation Site — Trinity River
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon (CDFW)
sources.quotedText: R1 Trinity Trinity River, above Clair Engle Lake Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take June-August

sources.title: Fish Planting Schedule — CDFW Data Portal
sources.quotedText: Week of Plant: 7/13/2025-7/19/2025; Water Name: Trinity River, above Clair Engle Lake; Counties: Trinity; Species: Trout

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 236551, "Trinity River", Stream, CA, near the Trinity Lake inlet (Trinity Center, Trinity Co.)
sources.quotedText: GNIS has no lake-mouth-specific point feature for this reach's Trinity Lake boundary; the Trinity River's own GNIS stream record (gaz_id 236551) includes a digitized vertex at Web Mercator (-13656431.6726, 5012404.9078), which converts to lon -122.6778, lat 41.0004 — about 2.3km from Trinity Center marina (40.9851,-122.7015), documented (Wikipedia) as being at 'the northern end of the main arm of' Trinity Lake, i.e. the river's inlet to the lake, matching the CCR boundary description '...downstream (south) to the mouth of Trinity Lake'. Cross-checked against the Tangle Blue Creek confluence (GNIS gaz_id 236006 mouth point, 41.2039,-122.7447 — this reach's upstream/northern boundary) and the USGS streamgage 'TRINITY R AB COFFEE C NR TRINITY CENTER CA' (41.1112,-122.7055, NWIS site 11523200), both of which sit along the river between this point and the Tangle Blue confluence, consistent with the entry's stated ~13.8-mile reach length. Corrects the file's prior guessed coordinate (-122.68,41.17), which sat ~18.9km north of this lake-mouth boundary — well up in the interior of the regulated reach rather than at its downstream boundary.

parameters.note: This special regulation applies to the Trinity River from the confluence with Tangle Blue Creek (Hwy. 3) downstream to the mouth of Trinity Lake, approximately 13.8 miles.

regulations.humanSummary: Special regulation applies from Tangle Blue Creek confluence downstream to the mouth of Trinity Lake (~13.8 miles)
regulations.verbatimText: Trinity River, above Trinity Lake (Trinity Co.) from the confluence with Tangle Blue Creek (Hwy. 3), downstream (south) to the mouth of Trinity Lake, approximately 13.8 miles.

regulations.humanSummary: Two-period season: take season from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30, then catch-and-release with artificial-lures-barbless gear from October 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit during the summer take season (Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30); possession limit equals one daily bag limit (5) per the general provision at 14 CCR §7.50(a) absent a separately stated possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag limit during the Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30 take season
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout

parameters.counting_rule: 0 trout — catch-and-release only from Oct. 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout, catch-and-release only, from Oct. 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day
regulations.verbatimText: Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

parameters.note: During the fall/winter catch-and-release period (Oct. 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day), only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. No gear restriction beyond the statewide default applies during the summer take season.

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks required Oct. 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists this reach (Trinity River, above Clair Engle Lake) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a release month range of June through August; the live CDFW Fish Planting Schedule corroborates actual weekly plants of trout on this water during 2025.
